headline: 107°F Sunday — run zones now, shade young tomatoes.
weather_notes: Run both zones this morning — 2 days dry entering today's 103°F crosses the 1-day re-water threshold for heat above 85°F.
Do all outdoor garden work before 8 AM today through Monday — Extreme Heat Warning is active through July 14 with 103–107°F highs.
Hang shade cloth over e1–e4 midday Sunday — 107°F risks permanent sunscald on 21-day transplants; remove by 5 PM.
Check the new potato-bag cutting daily through Monday — started July 9 and not yet established, making it the highest-risk plant in Sunday's 107°F.
